title: PlaytimeRewards
description: a simple really easy-to-configure playtimerewards plugin to boost player time and player count
body:
_PlaytimeRewards is a feature-rich Minecraft plugin designed for PaperMC servers that automatically tracks player activity and distributes customizable rewards based on playtime milestones. Whether you're running a survival server, creative community, or any other game mode, this plugin helps recognize and reward your most dedicated players._

**Core Features:**

Intuitive GUI System: Players can view their progress and claim rewards through a sleek, interactive inventory interface
Unlimited Milestones: Configure as many reward tiers as you want - from hourly bonuses to monthly achievements
Multi-Language Support: Built-in translations for English, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Croatian, and Chinese Simplified
Smart Permission System: Optional per-reward permissions with granular control and admin inheritance
Real-Time Tracking: Accurate playtime monitoring with configurable update intervals and automatic data persistence

**Advanced Capabilities:**

Sound & Visual Feedback: Customizable sound effects and server-wide announcements when players claim rewards
Debug Tools: Admin commands to manually adjust playtime for testing or special events
Robust Data Management: Automatic saving on player quit and server shutdown ensures no progress is ever lost
Performance Optimized: Lightweight design with async operations and efficient caching
Highly Configurable: Every aspect can be customized - from GUI layout to reward commands

**Perfect For:**

Survival servers wanting to reward long-term players
Creative communities recognizing building dedication
Minigame networks tracking participation
Roleplay servers with progression systems
Any server looking to increase player retention

**Technical Excellence:**

Compatible with PaperMC 1.21.8 and Java 21
Clean YAML configuration with extensive documentation
Plugin-friendly architecture that works with economy and permission plugins
Comprehensive error handling and logging for server administrators
This plugin transforms playtime from a simple statistic into an engaging progression system that keeps players coming back. With its professional-grade features and rock-solid reliability, PlaytimeRewards is the complete solution for recognizing player dedication on your Minecraft server.
